content:
- [User Profile](user_profile.md) — Isaac Dellinger, owner of Terra Incognita, independent journalism Next.js app
- [Project State](project_terra.md) — Terra Incognita project status, what's done, what's next

name: Project State — Terra Incognita
description: Current build status, completed features, and open items for the Terra Incognita Next.js app
type: project
---

Repo: github.com/owendlgr/terra-incognita, branch: `nextjs`. Deployed on Vercel.
Working directory: `/Users/isaacdellinger/Downloads/terra-incognita-next`

- Full Next.js 16.2.1 App Router setup with Vercel Postgres
- Nav: hover dropdown category menus (World/Conflict/Politics/Technology/Health/Culture), standalone links, mobile accordion
- 36-topic taxonomy across 7 categories in `src/lib/constants.ts`
- Category pages: /world, /conflict, /politics, /technology, /health, /culture with topic filter pills
- Globe map (Mapbox) with scroll zoom disabled
- Cookie banner: slides from bottom, site-branded
- Auth: sign in / sign up / 2FA / session cookies

- `ADMIN_EMAIL` — your email address, gets admin role on login
- `RESEND_API_KEY` — for transactional email
- `RESEND_FROM` — sending address (optional, defaults to noreply@terraincognita.news)
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` — for globe map
- `POSTGRES_URL` (and related) — Vercel Postgres

- Comment notifications wired: comments POST notifies article author + parent comment author on reply
- Community reply notifications wired: replies POST notifies post author
- Gallery sample file added at content/gallery/sample-dispatch.md (format: title/date/photo/caption/location/category/article_ref)
- Maps page: fully implemented (Globe + article pins + SavedMapsGallery)
- Wire widget: fully implemented (8 RSS feeds via /api/news)
- Stripe: fully implemented (checkout + webhook + tier assig

- Email opt-out wired: `email_opt_out` column checked before sending in both `comments/route.ts` and `community/replies/[id]/route.ts`
- `setImmediate` replaced with `after()` from `next/server` in both notification routes (Vercel-safe)
- Comment DELETE: now returns 404 instead of silent 200 when comment not found/not owned
- Community replies: added guard for `user` undefined when ADMIN_EMAIL has no DB row
- `/api/translate`: now requires session auth (was fully open to unauthenticated requests

- `src/middleware.ts`: security headers on all responses + auth gate on all `/api/*` (public exceptions listed) + page redirect for /write, /admin/*, /profile, /saved, /community. NOTE: Next.js 16 renamed middleware→proxy; default export works via backward compat.
- Rate limiting (DB-backed via `rate_limits` table + `src/lib/rateLimit.ts`): login (10/15min), signup (3/hr), comments (20/hr), community posts (10/hr), community replies (30/hr)
- Articles DB: `POST /api/articles` creates articles wi

- Membership paid tier: `src/lib/tiers.ts` (TIERS, isMember, getMemberBadge), /support tier cards, supporter badge on profile, early access gate via `public_at` column, /api/checkout uses STRIPE_PRICE_* env vars. New env vars needed: STRIPE_PRICE_SUPPORTER, STRIPE_PRICE_PATRON, STRIPE_PRICE_SUSTAINER
- Writer follow system: FollowButton component, /api/follow/[email]/count endpoint, /api/articles/following feed, "Following" tab on /profile
- Admin role check: checkAdmin() now checks DB role colu

- Weekly email digest: sendWeeklyDigest() in email.ts, /api/digest/articles, /api/digest/send (batched, test-send support), /admin/digest compose UI (article selector, editorial note, issue number, test/send)
- Writer style guide: content/style-guide.md — voice, story standards, structure, language, ethics, submission process, rights & credit

- Globe zoom fixed: HomeMap.tsx now has scrollZoom/doubleClickZoom/touchZoomRotate/boxZoom/keyboard all disabled (was missing these flags despite Globe.tsx having them)
- Nav: TopicNav removed from home page (was second navbar); Politics removed from NAV_CATEGORIES + TOPIC_CATEGORY (politics topics now map to 'world'); nav-inner made full-width (removed max-width/margin:auto constraint)
- Security: /api/token disabled (was exposing GitHub PAT to all authenticated users); OAuth callback XSS fixed

- Add real gallery photos to content/gallery/ (Isaac's own photos — see sample-dispatch.md format)
- Set up Stripe recurring subscription products → add STRIPE_PRICE_SUPPORTER, STRIPE_PRICE_PATRON, STRIPE_PRICE_SUSTAINER to Vercel env vars
- Begin 501(c3) incorporation in your state (~$100-200 + IRS Form 1023-EZ)
- Set up brand social accounts: X, Instagram, LinkedIn
- Recruit first 3 writers via journalism school outreach
- Publish minimum 10 articles before public launch

**Why:** This is Isaa

name: User Profile
description: Isaac Dellinger — owner and author of Terra Incognita, independent journalism publication
type: user
---

Isaac Dellinger is the sole author and owner of Terra Incognita, an independent journalism and photojournalism publication. He is hands-on with the codebase and makes product decisions directly. Prefers concise, direct responses. Works in sessions, picks up where he left off the next day.

- [project_cms_plan.md](project_cms_plan.md) — Custom CMS editor at /write with TipTap, GitHub API save
- [project_map_creator.md](project_map_creator.md) — Map creator tool for CMS (pin maps + choropleth, static/interactive)
- [project_platform_shift.md](project_platform_shift.md) — TI is a platform, not a personal site — use collective "we" language, not "by Isaac"
- [project_topics_taxonomy.md](project_topics_taxonomy.md) — Updated topics: World, Conflict, Politics, Technology, Health, Cultur

name: CMS overhaul plan
description: User wants to replace basic Sveltia CMS with a better editing experience — likely custom built-in editor at /write
type: project
---

User is dissatisfied with current Sveltia CMS ("very basic, doesn't allow for much creativity"). Also tried TinaCMS but hit infinite loading screens.

Preferred direction: **Custom built-in editor** at `/write` behind auth.
- TipTap or ProseMirror rich text editor
- Saves markdown to GitHub via API (existing GITHUB_TOKEN infra)

name: CMS map creator tool
description: User wants a map creator tool in the CMS editor for creating both pin maps and choropleth/data maps, with option to export as static image or interactive embed per map
type: project
---

**Status:** Not yet built — "Coming Soon" card in /admin dashboard. User wants to build it next session.

**Known bug to fix:** HomeMap theme toggle doesn't update the map background color live — only works on page reload. The `useEffect` that handles theme changes (`mapRe

name: Platform not personal site
description: Terra Incognita is a humanitarian journalism network for emerging Gen Z voices, NOT a personal journalism site — use collective "we" language
type: project
---

Terra Incognita is a **humanitarian journalism network for emerging voices** — a network-platform hybrid of vetted Gen Z journalists publishing under a shared editorial identity. NOT a solo blog or personal journalism site.

**Mission (from STRATEGY.md):** "Built to document how humanity trea

name: Updated topics and taxonomy (2026-03)
description: Terra Incognita's live site topics have shifted from 6 simple categories to a full hierarchical taxonomy with 6 main sections and subsections
type: project
---

The site's topic structure has been significantly expanded from the original 6 flat categories. As of 2026-03-28, the live site uses:

**Main Sections:**
- World (Middle East, Iran-Israel War, Russia-Ukraine, Europe, Africa, Asia, Latin America)
- Conflict (Armed Conflict, Humanita
File unknown was edited 61 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
